name: Elite Men’s Wellness & Hormone Evaluation
key_actions: Goals/symptom map; fertility intent; vitals/BP/waist; medical/prostate/CV/OSA/LUTS review; order baseline lab map; initiate foundational plan
outputs: Phenotype, risk map, labs ordered, foundational optimization plan

name: Lab Review & Optimization Decision
key_actions: Review testosterone pattern, SHBG/free T, LH/FSH, CBC/Hct, PSA context, metabolic labs; apply safety gates
outputs: Provider decision: testosterone pathway, fertility-preserving pathway, or non-TRT optimization

name: Early Response / Safety Check
key_actions: If therapy chosen: symptom response, adverse effects, BP, hematocrit as appropriate; if non-TRT: lifestyle adherence and fatigue differential

name: Performance & Metabolic Checkpoint
key_actions: Body composition/waist, libido/energy scores, BP, CBC/Hct, testosterone levels per protocol, metabolic markers as appropriate

name: Comprehensive Optimization Review
key_actions: Full symptom domains, CBC/Hct, BP, PSA/prostate context if applicable, metabolic labs, sleep/recovery assessment

name: Annual Re-Assessment
key_actions: Ongoing benefit, safety labs, prostate/BP/CV review, fertility status update, program goals
outputs: Continuation shared decision and yearly plan
